## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`go test ./... -race`, `go vet ./...`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`gofmt` / `go fmt`)
- [ ] If this changes HTTP/API behavior, OpenAPI was updated when applicable
- [ ] If this adds or renames top-level `docs/*.md` files, README’s documentation table was updated
